zh.Finlaggan Castle, Island Islay, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特易斯萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary MacDonald於1318年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特易斯萊時，她的父親Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles46歲，母親Agnes O Cathan39歲。她於1342年5月25日與William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年在法國享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary MacDonald was born in 1318, in Islay, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, was 46 and her mother, Agnes O Cathan, was 39. She married William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye on 25 May 1342, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1370, in France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary MacDonald est née en 1318, à Islay, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Agnes O Cathan, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye le 25 mai 1342, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1370, à France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary MacDonald 1318 in Islay, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles 46 und ihre Mutter Agnes O Cathan 39. Sie hat am 25. Mai 1342 in Scotland William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary MacDonaldが1318年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトイスレイで生まれた時，父Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Islesは46歳，母Agnes O Cathanは39歳であった。1342年5月25日にスコットランドでWilliam - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1370年にフランスで52歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary MacDonald(이)가 1318년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이슬레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes O Cathan(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1342년 5월 25일 스컷랜드에서 William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 프랑스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary MacDonald nasceu em 1318, em Islay, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Agnes O Cathan, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye em 25 de maio de 1342, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1370, em França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Finlaggan Castle, Island Islay, Scotland: ислеи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary MacDonald родилась в 1318 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes O Cathan, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye 25 мая 1342 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary MacDonald nació en 1318, en Islay, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Agnes O Cathan, tenía 39 años. Se casó con William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye el 25 de mayo de 1342, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1370, en Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
